title: Origins: The Rocker
description: A musician-themed Origin for the Origins mod. A musician traveling the lands to share their art.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/7qgfkv09liM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**This data pack is designed for the Origins mod.**

**The Rocker:** A rocker traveling the lands to share their art. Along their travels they use their musical skills to defeat those who get in their way.

**Impact:** 🟡🟡

**🟩 Power Chord [​Primary]:** When holding your guitar you can play a power chord that hurts enemies and sends them flying away from you.

**🟩 On the Road Again [​Secondary]:** Always being on the road means you’re used to not having a crafting table. To get around this you’ve learned how to craft without one.

**🟢 Trusty Guitar:** You spawn in ready to take on the world with the help of your legendary guitar.

**🟢 Part of the Band:** When around players or villagers, you get strength, haste, and luck applied.

**🟢 Musician:** Villagers love your music so they give you better trade deals.

**🟡 Rockin’ Aura:** Your passion for your craft is so strong that it can be seen around you.

**🔴 Too Busy:** You’re a busy person, you don’t have time to sleep, you are too busy making your next album.

**🔴 Skilled in a Different Craft:** You were too busy learning to play the guitar to learn how to wield a bow or shield. Crossbows seem to be simple enough for you to wield them though.

[If you have any questions, concerns, or bugs you would like to report, my Discord server is a great place for doing so.](https://discord.gg/b8jJUQ29Wg)
